---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the starter workflow or repo contract
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What gap exists today?

## Proposed Change

What should be added or changed?

## Why It Matters

How does this improve continuity, checkpoint quality, or starter usability?

## Scope

- docs only
- automation
- GitHub workflow
- starter variant
- release flow

## Acceptance Signal

How will we know this change is complete?

## Risks or Tradeoffs

What might become more complex or slower?
